failedAssertions.reason: Dead endpoint references still exist: /api/auth/change-password is referenced by two profile pages, but no endpoint route exists.
Expected /auth/callback to be publicly accessible with HTTP 200, but observed redirect to /login.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked on prerequisite: no working authenticated business-owner session path found via current app API mechanisms; without a valid session, the 200 authenticated branch cannot be validated.
